ranking.readme_summary: Claude Subconscious A background agent that whispers to Claude Code. A Letta agent that watches your sessions, reads your files, builds up memory over time, and whispers guidance back. > [!IMPORTANT] > Claude Subconscious is an experimental way to extend Claude Code (a closed source / black box agent) with the power of Letta's memory system, tool access, and context engineering
ranking.readme_summary_ja: Claude Subconscious A background agent that whispers to Claude Code. A Letta agent that watches your sessions, reads your files, builds up memory over time, and whispers guidance back. > [!IMPORTANT] > Claude Subconscious is an experimental way to extend Claude Code (a closed source / black box agent) with the power of Letta's memory system, tool access, and context engineering
